title: Washington: Department of Ecology Opens Heavy-duty Capacity Credit applications
content: Regulated entities and eligible participants can now apply for heavy-duty Capacity Credits for Fast Charging Infrastructure (FCI) and Hydrogen Refueling Infrastructure (HRI) under Washingtonâ€™s Clean Fuel Standard. These credits are designed to support investments that expand clean fuel production and increase heavy-duty transportation infrastructure capacity. Heavy-duty Capacity Credits are available to Clean Fuel Standard participants and other eligible entities that invest in projects that expand clean fuel production or delivery capacity in Washington. To apply, visit the CFS Program Documents page and download the FCI or HRI application templates. Each template includes instructions on how to complete the form. The page also includes an Application Upload Guidance document that explains how to submit your application in WFRS.
author: Analysts Account
source: Department of Ecology, State of Washnington
